creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
The best brunch spot in London’s Covent Garden if you ask Tripadvisor or Google, apparently 🧐

I wasn’t too amused when I had brunch at Drury 188-189 a couple of days ago. The restaurant wasn’t pleasant, and the food definitely wasn’t worth the wait.

We paid £41.55 in total.

I guess I’m still on the lookout for the best brunch in Covent Garden or London in general 😇
 #london #traveltips #restaurantreview

transcription.text: I tried the best rated brunch spot in London's Covent Garden. To be honest this place left me so confused but more on that later. There was a queue out the door but after around 35 minutes we got a table in the restaurant that to be honest felt pretty damp and busy to the point where it got a bit too much. The coffee was excellent but my partner felt that the bread under the smashed avocado with salmon was a bit burnt and that the overall experience was a bit unimpressive. I went for the savory waffle which turned out to just be regular dessert waffles with quite a few pieces of bacon under two eggs and am I wrong when I feel like the waffles aren't supposed to be that sweet when they're called savory? Overall I didn't hate this place but I'm definitely not coming back.
